questionHtml: Explain, with reference to Le Châtelier’s principle, the effect of using dilute rather than concentrated sulfuric acid as the catalyst on the yield of the reaction.
markschemeHtml:
dilute adds «excess» water

OR

water is a product ✔

 

shift left AND decreases yield ✔

meta.title: Explain, with reference to Le Châtelier’s principle, the effect of using dilute rather than concentrated sulfuric acid as the catalyst on the yield of the reaction.
